summary: Plasiyer Draft Customer Management Frontend Batch testing completed successfully. All features working correctly including draft customer list, approve modal, and integration with backend APIs.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing draft customers from previous GIB import
context_for_next_testing_agent: Draft Customer Management batch verified. Key findings: 1) Plasiyer login works with sf_plasiyer/plasiyer123. 2) Customers page has two subviews: 'Aktif Müşteriler' and 'Draft Müşteriler' tabs. 3) No new sidebar item was added - Draft Customers is inside existing Customers area. 4) Default view is Active Customers (no regression). 5) Draft Customers tab loads data from GET /api/draft-customers?salespersonId= successfully. 6) Draft customer cards show: business_name, tax_number/tc_no, invoice_count, last_invoice_date, total_amount, status. 7) Loading/empty/error states exist with proper data-testid attributes. 8) Approve button opens modal with form fields: customer_type, risk_limit, balance, phone, address. 9) Approve form submits to POST /api/draft-customers/:id/approve successfully. 10) On successful approve, toast shows 'Draft müşteri onaylandı' and row disappears from list. 11) Mobile viewport works correctly for both list and modal. 12) Backend validation errors return proper HTTP status codes (422 for validation, 404 for not found, 403 for wrong salesperson).

frontend_tests.customers_page_renders: PASS - no regression on existing active customer view
frontend_tests.view_switcher_tabs: PASS - 'Aktif Müşteriler' and 'Draft Müşteriler' tabs present
frontend_tests.default_view_is_active: PASS - Active Customers tab selected by default
frontend_tests.draft_customers_loads_data: PASS - 14 draft customers loaded from backend
frontend_tests.draft_customer_card_fields: PASS - business_name, tax/tc, invoice_count, last_invoice_date, total_amount, status displayed
frontend_tests.approve_button_opens_modal: PASS - modal opens with all form fields
frontend_tests.approve_modal_form_fields: PASS - customer_type, risk_limit, balance, phone, address present
frontend_tests.approve_submit_success: PASS - toast shows success, row removed from list
frontend_tests.no_new_sidebar_item: PASS - sidebar has only: Ana Sayfa, Smart Orders, Musteriler, Siparisler, Stok, Teslimatlar, Kampanyalar
frontend_tests.mobile_viewport_list: PASS - draft customer list renders correctly on mobile
frontend_tests.mobile_viewport_modal: PASS - approve modal renders correctly on mobile
